overall.description: FPV drone footage in a game engine showing a coastal waterfront path. The camera moves smoothly along a concrete walkway past rocky cliffs and breakwaters, navigating around rock formations to reveal an open harbor with modern apartment buildings. Bright sunny conditions with clear blue skies and turquoise water, with no pedestrians or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal breakwater path between rocky cliff and harbor

agents.ego_description: moving forward steadily along the waterfront path with rocky cliffs on the left and harbor on the right

entered.detail: tall white and gray rock formation with geometric textures forming a wall along the left side of the path
wide gray concrete path with white painted lines running along the waterfront
large rocky outcrop extending into the water with a small structure or flag on top
tetrahedron-shaped concrete blocks lining the edge of the water

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a smooth forward movement along a concrete waterfront path. A massive rocky cliff face dominates the left side while the harbor with turquoise water stretches to the right. Large concrete breakwater blocks line the water's edge, and a prominent rock formation juts out into the harbor ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor turning area with panoramic water views

events.description: camera begins turning right to navigate around the rock formation and follow the curve of the waterfront

agents.ego_description: executing a smooth right turn around the rocky outcrop to follow the curved waterfront path

entered.detail: tree-covered hillside visible across the harbor in the distance
expansive turquoise water of the harbor opening up as the camera turns

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right around the rock formation, transitioning from the enclosed cliffside path to an open harbor view. The rock island moves to the left and recedes into the distance as the concrete breakwater blocks shift to the left side. The view opens up to reveal the expansive harbor and a forested shoreline across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with harbor views

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the curved waterfront path with open water views to the right

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the open waterfront promenade, the camera moves past the rock formations with the harbor water now on the right. The distant forested shoreline shifts to the right side of the frame as the path curves, with concrete breakwaters lining the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront promenade with modern residential towers

events.description: modern apartment buildings come into view on the left, transitioning from natural coastal scenery to urban environment

agents.ego_description: moving along the waterfront path as the environment transitions to an urban setting with tall buildings

entered.detail: tall multi-story residential buildings with balconies and modern architecture lining the left side of the path
red and white striped concrete barriers placed along the left edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an urban waterfront as modern apartment towers rise on the left side of the path. Red and white striped traffic barriers appear along the walkway edge, and the natural rock formations give way to constructed architecture. The camera continues along the concrete promenade with the harbor still visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal promenade that transforms from a rugged cliffside path into a modern urban waterfront. It begins with a smooth forward glide beside a massive rocky cliff and turquoise waters, moving toward a prominent rock formation that juts into the harbor. As the camera turns right around this formation, the enclosed cliffside opens up into an expansive view of the harbor and a distant forested shoreline. The scene then shifts as the path curves, leaving the natural rocks behind while the harbor remains to the right. Finally, the landscape transitions into a city environment where modern apartment towers rise on the left and red and white striped traffic barriers line the concrete walkway.
